summary: Passionate backend developer with strong problem-solving skills and a solid background in data structures and algorithms. Experienced in building scalable web applications using Django and React. Eager to contribute to impactful projects and grow as a backend engineer in a collaborative environment.

projects.name: AltRec - Full Stack Q&A-Based Product Recommendation System
highlights: Built a user-driven product suggestion platform with secure authentication and role-specific feature access
Integrated Firebase Authentication (Email/Google) and JWT for route protection and user session handling
Enabled users to manage product queries, as well as recommend alternative products with details
Designed personalized dashboards for managing queries, viewing recommendations, and tracking user actions
Implemented search, layout toggle, and responsive UI with Tailwind; managed backend with Express and MongoDB

projects.name: Employee Management System - Full Stack Role-Based Dashboard
highlights: Developed a secure employee management system with role-based access control (Admin, Manager, Employee)
Integrated Firebase Authentication for sign-up/login, and JWT for protected routes
Enabled dashboard-specific views based on user role with real-time user data tracking
Implemented MongoDB CRUD operations for managing employees, departments, and payroll
Designed responsive UI with Tailwind and handled state with React hooks

certifications.name: Complete Web Development Course - Programming Hero
